name: Zucchini Cheddar Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups packed coarsely shredded zucchini (8 oz.)
1/2 cup coarsely shredded sharp cheddar cheese (2 oz.)
2 rectangular slices of cheddar cheese, each cut into two triangles
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to hot (425°F). Recrimp pie shell in its aluminum pan, making high fluted edge. Or, transfer pastry to a 9-inch square baking dish; crimp edges.
2. Sauté onion in butter in a medium skillet over medium heat for 3 minutes or until tender.
3. Stir in zucchini, oregano, thyme, salt, and pepper. Cook, stirring constantly, for 5 minutes or until zucchini is tender and most of the liquid has evaporated. Set aside off heat.
4. Beat eggs with remaining salt and pepper in a bowl. Add Parmesan cheese and half and half.
5. Spoon reserved zucchini mixture evenly into pie shell. Sprinkle with cheddar cheese.
6. Pour egg mixture over zucchini.
7. Bake in preheated oven for 20 minutes; cover crust with aluminum foil if browning too fast. Lower oven temperature to slow (325°F). Bake for 30 to 35 minutes or until center of filling is just set.
8. Overlap cheddar triangles over top of quiche during last 2 minutes of baking.
9. Let quiche stand 20 minutes. Makes 6 servings.
